category_sources: source_facts.description says text-to-speech application designed to run efficiently on CPUs; official README describes CPU-efficient TTS and voice cloning.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Pocket TTS; source_facts.name is pocket-tts.
docs_sources: Official README links Documentation on kyutai-labs.github.io; repository contains a docs directory with API Reference, CLI Commands, and index.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; official README links its GitHub Repository entry.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify CPU text-to-speech, Python API/CLI, streaming, and voice cloning.
